regulatory_risks: Changes in banking regulations and supervision intensity
Dodd-Frank Act compliance requirements
Basel III capital requirements and potential increases
CFPB consumer protection regulations and enforcement
CRA (Community Reinvestment Act) compliance requirements
Bank Secrecy Act and anti-money laundering (AML) compliance
OFAC sanctions compliance
Cybersecurity and data privacy regulations (GLBA, FCRA, state laws including CCPA)
FDIC insurance assessments and special assessments
Debit card interchange fee regulations (Regulation II)
Overdraft fee regulations and CFPB final rule on overdraft credit
Federal Reserve stress testing (CCAR) and capital planning requirements
Enhanced prudential standards for banks over $100 billion in assets
Potential long-term debt requirements and clean holding company requirements
Resolution planning requirements
Merger and acquisition approval standards and increased scrutiny
Fair lending and equal credit opportunity regulations
State attorney general enforcement of consumer protection laws
Climate-related disclosure and risk management expectations
Volcker Rule restrictions on proprietary trading
Compensation regulations and clawback requirements

sanction_risks: Potential impact from global conflicts (Ukraine-Russia, Middle East)
Trade policy changes including tariffs and retaliatory tariffs
